generated_oml:
instance sensingComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing Component description"
]
instance dataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom sensingComponent
]
instance insight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight description"
]
instance service : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service description",
    DTDFVocab:provides insight
]
instance enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler description",
    DTDFVocab:enables service
]
instance model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model description",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo enabler
]
instance data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data description",
    DTDFVocab:fromData dataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo enabler
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system utilizes SysML for Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE), AADL, ACME, and MontiArc as architecture description languages for component & connector perspectives, along with MathWorks Simulink for behavior simulation and general-purpose programming languages like C++ or Java for detailed implementation, as referenced in the MBSE context."
]
